title: Document that we assume exact digest matching in c/common/pkg/manifests
body:
This is all fine and internally consistent, but eventually that assumption will probably require changes in the Podman caller of c/common/libimage.ManifestList.RemoveInstance.

Should not change behavior.

Cc: @lsm5

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6551**
